definitions: A prominent character in the Naruto manga and anime series, initially appearing as a masked figure and later revealed to be Obito Uchiha, a former member of Konohagakure's Uchiha clan.
A fictional ninja from the Uchiha clan, known for his powerful Mangekyo Sharingan and his role in the Fourth Great Ninja War.
examples: Obito's true identity was a major plot twist.
Many fans consider Obito to be one of the most complex villains.
The fight between Kakashi and Obito was intense.
